validation_results.notes: DFCanvas DebugPanel shows immediately on F9 press. ECS KeyInputSystem callback fires OnF9Pressed -> RuntimeDriver.ToggleDebug(). Animation removed (Update() never fires in DINO), Show/Hide now immediate. Log: '[RuntimeDriver] F9 pressed (via KeyInputSystem)'
DFCanvas ModMenuPanel shows on F10 press. Same ECS callback path as F9. Log: '[RuntimeDriver] F10 pressed (via KeyInputSystem)'

NativeMenuInjector successfully injects button (sibling_index 12, activeInHierarchy=true). onClick rewired to open DINOForge mod menu (same as F10). However DINO's UiGrid re-renders button labels from its internal data list each frame, so label shows 'OPTIONS' instead of 'Mods'. Button functionality works; label override blocked by UiGrid. Requires Harmony patch on UiGrid.SetButtonLabel() to permanently override text.

log_evidence.ugui_ready: [RuntimeDriver] DFCanvas.OnInitSuccess — UGUI canvas ready on main thread

root_causes_fixed: DFCanvas OnInitSuccess callback registered after Initialize() — fixed: now registered before
DebugPanel animation used Update() which never fires in DINO — fixed: immediate Show/Hide
ModMenuPanel animation same issue — fixed: immediate Show/Hide
F9/F10 background thread GetAsyncKeyState doesn't see synthetic input — fixed: use ECS KeyInputSystem callbacks instead
Mods button clone ignored by UiGrid — partial fix: repurpose existing Options button, onClick rewired
